title: MakakitoScenario
description: A chaos scenario definition. Consumed by the runner to inject faults into a playground service.

description.description: Optional description of what this scenario tests.

faults.description: Ordered list of faults to inject. Applied sequentially unless a scheduler is introduced in a later version.

Defaults.description: Default timing values applied to every fault that does not specify its own.

Fault.description: A single fault to inject into the target service.

type.description: Fault kind identifier. Must match a fault driver registered in the runner (e.g. 'cpu-stress', 'http-fault', 'network-latency', 'queue-consumer-lag').

description.description: Optional human-readable note about what this fault step exercises.

durationSeconds.description: How long to hold this fault. Overrides defaults.durationSeconds for this fault only.

parameters.description: Fault-driver-specific parameters. Keys and values are defined by each driver; this object is intentionally open.
